sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data documented for this title

special_mechanics.name: Gear Shifting System
special_mechanics.description: Bike has four speeds. Shifting to fourth gear at high speed grants instant speed boost. Remaining in higher gear while stopped results in slower acceleration.

physics_values.gear_boost_mechanic: shifting to 4th at high speed grants boost
physics_values.acceleration_penalty: higher gear while stopped reduces acceleration

special_mechanics.name: Vehicle Destruction and Reform
special_mechanics.description: When Mach Rider is destroyed, the bike separates into fragments and reforms if energy/lives remain.

special_mechanics.name: Bike Ramming Mechanic
special_mechanics.description: Player can block attacking enemies by ramming them against track hazards for additional points and bullet replenishment.

tier_notes: Tier 3 empirical/qualitative data. Mach Rider is a vehicular combat game, not a platformer with traditional jump mechanics. No quantified physics parameters documented in available sources. Game focuses on bike acceleration, gear management, and steering rather than character movement physics. No sub-pixel rendering data available.
sources_used: The Cutting Room Floor - Mach Rider article
